examples: Pounding argil is to make ware. When we dig central part of argil, it becomes a ware.
Secondly, models with different backfill-material such as argil fly-ash concrete, soil, sand, grit and lime-stabilized soil were experimented.
Different from the argil and concrete one, our fiberglass flowerpots are not only light in weight but also durable and solid. You can carry and move them very easily no matter how big it is.
